description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a light blue exterior and a rectangular footprint, set on a green lawn. The front features a covered porch supported by white columns and a small set of steps leading up to the main entrance. Windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and rear facades, with a mix of single and double-hung styles. The right side of the house includes a second-story balcony with a white railing, while the left side is more plain with minimal window openings. The roof is flat with a small overhang above the porch, and the overall design is simple and functional, reminiscent of American Colonial or Craftsman influences. The house appears to be constructed primarily from wood, with some concrete or masonry elements for the foundation and porch.
description: A two-story light blue house with a covered front porch, symmetrical windows, and a second-story balcony, set on a green lawn. The design is simple and functional, with a flat roof and white trim.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch with white columns, main entrance, and symmetrical windows above.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the plain facade with minimal windows and the extension of the porch roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a back door, two windows, and the continuation of the balcony on the right.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring the second-story balcony with white railing and a side entrance to the porch.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with white columns, steps, and a central door beneath a small overhang
